info.name: SalonOS - Complete API Collection v3
info.description: All APIs for SalonOS. Variables: baseUrl, salon_token, admin_token, salonId, serviceId, bookingId, staffId, userId, resetToken, paymentMethodId, notificationId, targetSalonId, conversationId, customerId. Dashboard auth uses httpOnly cookies (set automatically on login). Admin auth uses Bearer token (admin_token variable).

header.description: Identifies salon app deployment (NEXT_PUBLIC_SALON_ID). Must match JWT salonId.
The MongoDB _id of the salon.

request.description: Step 1 of registration. Validates that the email is not already registered for this salon, generates a 6-digit OTP and emails it. OTP is valid for 10 minutes.

header.description: The MongoDB _id of the salon. In production this comes from NEXT_PUBLIC_SALON_ID env var.

request.description: Step 2 of registration. Verifies the OTP sent to the email, then creates the account and returns a JWT token. Call Send Registration OTP first.

header.description: Only needed when testing via Postman (cookie not sent). In browser, cookie is used automatically.

request.description: Returns the current authenticated user and salon info from the httpOnly cookie (dashboard users) or Bearer token. Used for session bootstrap on page load.

Rotates the dashboard access token (15 min) and refresh token (7 days) using the dashboard_refresh_token httpOnly cookie. No body required. Returns 401 if refresh token is missing or expired. Automatically called by the dashboard API client on 401 responses.

Clears the dashboard_access_token and dashboard_refresh_token httpOnly cookies. No auth required. Use this to sign out dashboard users (owners, staff, customers). Admin logout is handled client-side by clearing localStorage admin_token.

header.description: Identifies salon app deployment (NEXT_PUBLIC_SALON_ID). Must match JWT salonId.

item.name: Get Salon Detail (users + bookings + services + staff)

request.description: Admin adds a service directly to a salon.
Admin adds a staff member directly to a salon.
Admin registers a customer directly for a salon.

request.description: Returns all conversations for the logged-in user. Each item includes unreadCount (for the caller's side), lastMessage, lastMessageAt, and populated customer/salon info.
Customer sends a message to a salon. Creates the conversation automatically if it doesn't exist. Returns { message, conversationId, unreadCount }.
Owner/Staff sends a message to a customer. Creates the conversation automatically if it doesn't exist. Returns { message, conversationId, unreadCount }.
Returns paginated messages sorted oldest→newest. Also resets the caller's unread count to 0. Response: { conversation, messages, pagination: { page, limit, total, hasMore } }.
Marks the caller's unread count as 0 without re-fetching the thread. Call this when the user opens the chat screen.
List all bookings across all salons. Admin only.
Get a single booking by ID. Admin only.
Create a booking for any salon as admin.
Update booking status, timeSlot, notes or paymentStatus. Admin only.
Permanently delete a booking. Admin only.
Returns KPI summary, time-series, status/payment breakdown, top salons, top staff, and popular time slots.
Custom date range analytics. Both from and to are required when period=custom.
